summary: Kevin Warsh and three other veterans of the 2008 global financial crisis will share a stage this week as the danger of renewed turmoil continues to haunt central bankers.

title: Tech Equity Sales Renew AI Debt-Binge Worries
title_cn: 科技股销售再次引发人工智能债务狂潮担忧
summary: Tech companies are selling stock like it’s the dot-com boom, and some investors fear that’s a bad sign for bondholders.

title: Bloomberg This Weekend 6/27/2026
title_cn: 彭博社本周末 2026 年 6 月 27 日
summary: The news doesn’t stop when markets close. Hosts David Gura, Christina Ruffini and Lisa Mateo bring clarity, context and a bit of humor to the weekend’s biggest headlines, LIVE from New York. Joined by Fmr. UN Ambassador and Fmr. USAID Administrator Samantha Power and Oklahoma Senator Alan Armstrong. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Aid Groups Flock to Venezuela In Search-and-Rescue Frenzy
title_cn: 援助团体涌向委内瑞拉疯狂搜救
summary: Two of the US military ships used in a blockade meant to pressure Nicolás Maduro have headed back toward Venezuela, this time with rescue teams, equipment and medical aid after devastating twin earthquakes struck the country this week.

title: Pointed News Quiz | Reddit, Music, YA Novels
title_cn: 针对性新闻测验 | Reddit、音乐、青少年小说
summary: David Gura, Christina Ruffini, and Lisa Mateo of “Bloomberg This Weekend” play Pointed! Wager your points, leverage your bets and answer wisely. A new quiz is available to play each week on Bloomberg.com  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: ECB’s Schnabel Sees Upside Inflation Risks Despite Peace Deal
title_cn: 欧洲央行行长施纳贝尔认为，尽管达成和平协议，通胀仍存在上行风险
summary: European Central Bank Executive Board member Isabel Schnabel warned that price pressures could turn out stronger than anticipated even as a US-Iran peace deal reopens the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Sen. Armstrong: Permitting Is Key to Lower Energy Costs
title_cn: 参议员阿姆斯特朗：许可是降低能源成本的关键
summary: Senator Alan Armstrong (R-Oklahoma) joins David Gura and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend and says permitting reform—not additional federal spending—is the most effective way to lower housing and energy costs, arguing regulatory delays have created infrastructure bottlenecks that drive up prices for consumers. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: America’s Farmers Need USMCA More Than Ever
title_cn: 美国农民比以往任何时候都更需要 USMCA
summary: For many American farmers, Canada and Mexico have become indispensable export markets at a time when trade disputes, weak commodity prices, and rising costs are already straining the agricultural economy. Iowa farmer Stu Swanson says many producers are operating on dwindling hope as financial  pressures mount. CoBank CEO Tom Halverson argues that trade deals have helped US  exports to Canada and Mexico grow roughly 600% since NAFTA’s creation. As negotiations begin, farmers are less focused on expanding the agreement than on preserving certainty and avoiding new disruptions that could further weaken an already fragile farm economy.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Pet Market Set to Surpass $250 Billion
title_cn: 美国宠物市场将突破 2500 亿美元
summary: Americans are increasing spending on their pets beyond traditional preventative care, with the US pet market projected to grow from approximately $150 billion today to over $250 billion in the next decade. Bloomberg Intelligence consumer staples analyst Diana Rosero-Pena joins Bloomberg This Weekend with David Gura, Christina Ruffini, and special dog correspondent Brutus to provide insights into the future of pet retail. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Venezuela Struggles with Earthquake Rescue Efforts as Death Toll Nears 1,000
title_cn: 委内瑞拉地震救援工作举步维艰，死亡人数接近千人
summary: Bloomberg News Andean Bureau Reporter Andreina Itriago is on Bloomberg This Weekend explaining concerns that the official casualty figures in Venezuela after the earthquake are likely underreported, with many more deaths expected as rescue efforts continue and bodies are recovered. Itriago explains to hosts David Gura and Christina Ruffini that the government’s capacity to conduct search and rescue operations is described as very limited, with much of the initial response carried out by local citizens rather than state forces. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AI’s Energy Crunch Has Investors Searching for Next IPO Winners
title_cn: 人工智能的能源紧缩让投资者寻找下一个 IPO 获胜者
summary: The artificial intelligence boom has a power problem, and Wall Street is betting billions on companies that promise to solve it — even if some of the technology hasn’t been fully developed yet.

title: Schrödinger's Strait of Hormuz: Open or Closed?
title_cn: 薛定谔的霍尔木兹海峡：开放还是封闭？
summary: Despite a ship being struck in the Strait of Hormuz on Thursday and another incident over the weekend, some vessels continue to travel the strait on both the Iranian and Omani sides. However, overall traffic remains significantly reduced compared to pre-conflict levels, with daily ship movements down from over 140 in February to approximately 30-40 currently. Bloomberg News Energy & Commodities Reporter Stephen Stapczynski joins Bloomberg This Weekend to explain to hosts David Gura and Christina Ruffini that safety concerns persist, causing ship owners, captains, and energy exporters to reassess the risks of passage through this critical waterway. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: MSG Mystery Event, Ranch Dressing Love | BTW: Headlines You Should See
title_cn: 味精神秘活动，牧场调味爱|顺便说一句：你应该看到的头条新闻
summary: Catch up on all the headlines with BTW. Lisa Mateo, Christina Ruffini and David Gura dive into the headlines you may have missed on Bloomberg This Weekend. Watch the show LIVE every Saturday and Sunday morning. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Brutal Heat Wave Scorches Europe, Raising Climate Inflation Concerns
title_cn: 残酷热浪灼烧欧洲，引发气候通胀担忧
summary: Europe has been experiencing a record-breaking heat wave, with temperatures soaring to historic highs, particularly in France where temperatures were above 110 degrees Fahrenheit. Bloomberg News Weather & Climate Reporter Joe Wertz and Climate Reporter Emma Court are on Bloomberg This Weekend to warn that such extreme heat events are likely to become more frequent globally, potentially driving up costs and contributing to what is being termed 'climate inflation,' placing additional financial burdens on consumers. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Tech Slump Deepens
title_cn: 科技股下滑加剧
summary: Technology stocks closed out a volatile week sharply lower as investors reassessed the sustainability of the AI trade, with concerns over rising semiconductor costs, memory pricing and capital spending. Bloomberg Intelligence Global Head of Technology Research Mandeep Singh and Bloomberg News Macro Strategist Cameron Crise also explain to hosts of Bloomberg This Weekend David Gura and Christina Ruffini the evolving US restrictions on advanced AI models, the cooling IPO market, and questions over whether AI companies can generate enough revenue to justify soaring valuations amid rising costs. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Why Krugman Thinks We Need Chinese Auto Tariffs
title_cn: 为什么克鲁格曼认为我们需要中国汽车关税
summary: As the United States, Canada, and Mexico prepare to renegotiate the USMCA trade deal, one industry sits squarely at the center of the debate: automobiles. Companies like Linamar depend on highly integrated supply chains that send components across borders multiple times before a vehicle is completed. Nobel laureate Paul Krugman argues that competition from China demands some trade barriers, while Council on Foreign Relations expert Shannon O’Neil says the region’s manufacturing strength depends on cross-border production. Supporters of the agreement warn that uncertainty poses the biggest risk to investment, jobs, and the future of a trade relationship that supports over a trillion dollars in annual commerce.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: What Comes Next for the US-Mexico-Canada Agreement
title_cn: 美国-墨西哥-加拿大协议的下一步是什么
summary: The North American trade agreement is up for review

title: Carl Richards on Being Yourself
title_cn: 卡尔·理查兹谈做你自己
summary: Barry sits down with Carl Richards author of "Your Money: Reimagining Wealth in Simple Sketches ." They discuss Carl's unlikely start in finance and building his own firm. Carl also breaks down how one sketch helped him translate wealth management and become a New York Times columnist.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Brookfield in Fight Over Solar Firm Where Cash ‘Evaporated’
title_cn: 布鲁克菲尔德因太阳能公司之争现金“蒸发”
summary: Joh. Berenberg, Gossler & Co. KG and Brookfield Asset Management Ltd. are battling over the future of GoldenPeaks, an energy company staring at collapse after borrowing $1.5 billion for European solar-power projects.

title: Bangladesh Gets $1 Billion World Bank Fertilizer, Food Loans
title_cn: 孟加拉国获得世界银行 10 亿美元化肥和粮食贷款
summary: The World Bank approved two loans totaling over $1 billion to help Bangladesh cope with volatility in the global fertilizer market and improve food security.

title: City of London Braces for Burnham Government’s Chancellor Pick
title_cn: 伦敦金融城为伯纳姆政府的财政大臣人选做好准备
summary: The Mansion House dinner each summer is normally a chance for the City of London to hear what’s on the Chancellor of the Exchequer’s mind. Except this year, nobody’s sure who the chancellor will be.

title: Africa CDC Calls for More Ebola Funding
title_cn: 非洲疾病预防控制中心呼吁提供更多埃博拉资金
summary: As Ebola cases rise in the Democratic Republic of Congo and Uganda, Africa CDC's Director General Jean Kaseya says more funding from Western governments is needed to contain the outbreak. Kaseya warns that closing borders won't stop the virus from spreading. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: More H5 Avian Flu Cases Detected in Wild Birds in Australia
title_cn: 澳大利亚野生鸟类中发现更多 H5 禽流感病例
summary: The deadly H5 avian influenza has been discovered in a fourth wild bird in Australia, with a fifth case suspected.

title: BYD’s Wang Holds Talks in Shaanxi as Visits Span Five Provinces
title_cn: 比亚迪王总在陕西举行会谈 跨五省出访
summary: BYD Co. Chairman Wang Chuanfu met Shaanxi Provincial Party Secretary Zhao Yide and Governor Zhao Gang on Friday, the latest in a series of meetings with leaders across at least five provinces since March.

title: Bolivia Moves to Flexible Exchange-Rate System After 15 Years
title_cn: 玻利维亚 15 年后转向灵活汇率制度
summary: Bolivia is moving to a flexible exchange-rate system to strengthen macroeconomic stability, its Finance Ministry announced Friday.

title: Wall Street Week | USMCA: Can North America’s Trade Deal Survive?
title_cn: 华尔街周刊 | USMCA：北美贸易协议能否生存？
summary: This week, a special edition of Wall Street Week on the USMCA trade deal. The renegotiations are testing the future of an auto industry built on decades of cross-border integration. And, American farmers increasingly depend on exports to Canada and Mexico as other overseas markets become more difficult to access. Plus, years of infrastructure investment have created an energy market that crosses borders more easily than political narratives suggest. Later, can three countries with different priorities still agree on a common economic vision? (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Earn Your Leisure Co-Founders on Financial Literacy
title_cn: 赢得休闲联合创始人的金融素养
summary:
The CEOs and co-founders of Earn Your Leisure, Rashad Bilal and Troy Millings, explain their educational platform that looks to help individuals gain 
 financial freedom and generational wealth. They discuss how to ride the tech stock wave with Romaine Bostick and Katie Greifeld on Bloomberg's "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Tennis Pro Caroline Wozniacki on Wimbledon
title_cn: 网球职业选手卡罗琳·沃兹尼亚奇在温布尔登网球公开赛
summary: Tennis champion Caroline Wozniacki sat down with Romaine Bostick and Katie Greifeld on the sidelines of The Wimbledon Court in Central Park. She discusses the future of the sport, player compensation, and advice for her fellow tennis star Serena Williams re-entering competition.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Soaring iPad, Xbox Prices Reveal Pain of Memory Chip Mess
title_cn: iPad、Xbox 价格飙升揭示了内存芯片混乱的痛苦
summary: Within a span of five hours Thursday, Apple Inc. and Microsoft Corp. hiked the prices for such popular products as Xbox video-game consoles, Macs and iPads.

title: Australia to Strengthen Enforcement of Under-16 Social Media Ban
title_cn: 澳大利亚将加强对 16 岁以下社交媒体禁令的执行
summary: Australia will grant its online safety watchdog more powers and increase the maximum penalty for breaches of its world-first social media ban, with Prime Minister Anthony Albanese saying big tech companies are not doing enough to comply.

title: Apple Seeks US Approval to Buy Chips From Blacklisted CXMT: FT
title_cn: 苹果寻求美国批准从列入黑名单的CXMT购买芯片：FT
summary: Apple Inc. is pressing the White House for approval to purchase memory chips from a blacklisted Chinese company as it grapples to rein in chip costs, the Financial Times reported on Saturday.

title: China’s Industrial Profit Gains Dip in Sign of Weakness
title_cn: 中国工业利润增幅出现疲软迹象
summary: The increase in China’s industrial profits softened for the first time since November, suggesting that strong exports and price gains failed to offset the drag from tepid domestic demand.

title: Trustpilot Teams Up With Shopify to Connect Reviews to Stores
title_cn: Trustpilot 与 Shopify 合作将评论与商店联系起来
summary: Trustpilot Group Plc partnered with e-commerce giant Shopify Inc. to allow merchants to showcase and manage Trustpilot reviews directly on their online stores.

title: Anthropic’s Mythos 5 AI Model Cleared by US for Wider Use
title_cn: Anthropic 的 Mythos 5 人工智能模型获得美国批准以供更广泛使用
summary: Anthropic PBC won US approval to restore some access to its powerful Mythos 5 artificial intelligence model, after resolving Trump administration concerns about the technology’s potential threats to national security.

title: AI Is Already Reshaping US Politics at Every Level
title_cn: 人工智能已经在各个层面重塑美国政治
summary: From data center backlash to boundless cash from tech billionaires and concerns about deepfaked campaign ads, AI is everywhere in the 2026 US elections.

title: S&P 500 Halts Four-Day Drop To End Jittery Week | The Close 6/26/2026
title_cn: 标准普尔 500 指数停止四天下跌，结束紧张不安的一周收盘价 2026 年 6 月 26 日
summary: Bloomberg Television brings you the latest news and analysis leading up to the final minutes and seconds before and after the closing bell on Wall Street. Today's guests are Sony Pictures Entertainment Motion Picture Group Chairman & CEO, Tom Rothman;  Former Pro Tennis Player, Caroline Wozniacki;   Earn Your Leisure Co-Founders and CEOs, Rashad Bilal & Troy Millings;  Forum AI Co-Founder & CEO, Campbell Brown;  RockCreek Founder & CEO, Afsaneh Beschloss;   Invesco Alterative ETF Strategy Head, Kathy Kriskey;  Franklin Templeton Head of Global Index Portfolio MGMT, Dina Ting;  and Morningstar Research Senior Equity Analyst, David Swartz (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Forum AI CEO on Pitfalls With AI in Politics
title_cn: 论坛人工智能首席执行官谈人工智能在政治中的陷阱
summary: Campbell Brown, Co-Founder and CEO of Forum AI, discusses the need for AI companies to open up for scrutiny. She discusses with Romaine Bostick on Bloomberg's "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Sony Pictures’ Tom Rothman: Summer Box Office Is Roaring
title_cn: 索尼影业的汤姆·罗斯曼：夏季票房飙升
summary: Tom Rothman, Chairman and CEO of Sony Pictures Entertainment Motion Pictures Group, discusses the future of Hollywood and how studios can create cultural pressure to keep theater seats filled. He joins Romaine Bostick and Katie Greifeld on set.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX, Charter Discussed Mobile Phone Partnership in US
title_cn: SpaceX 与 Charter 讨论了在美国的手机合作伙伴关系
summary: SpaceX and Charter Communications Inc. have held executive-level talks about partnering on a consumer mobile phone offering, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Anthropic Moves Toward Deal With US to Lift Curbs on AI Models
title_cn: Anthropic 正与美国达成协议，取消对人工智能模型的限制
summary: Anthropic PBC and the Trump administration are moving closer to an agreement that would lift US restrictions on the company’s top two artificial intelligence models after weeks of talks between the two sides over security of the systems, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: OpenAI Limits Release of New Model Under Pressure From US
title_cn: OpenAI 迫于美国压力限制新模型发布
summary: OpenAI is rolling out a preview version of a more capable new artificial intelligence model to select partners before making it available more widely in the coming weeks, following pressure from the Trump administration to stagger the release.

title: Unremarkable Economy, Remarkable Rally: Skelly
title_cn: 经济平淡，反弹引人注目：斯凯利
summary: Dan Skelly, managing director and head of the equity model portfolio team at Morgan Stanley Wealth Management, joins Lisa Mateo and Tom Keene on "Bloomberg Money." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Chip Stocks Plunge as AI Selloff Ripples Across From Asia
title_cn: 人工智能抛售席卷亚洲，美国芯片股暴跌
summary: A global selloff in the shares of chipmakers dragged US indexes sharply lower amid doubts about the sustainability of the AI-fueled tech rally. Katherine Kostereva, CEO, Creatio joined Bloomberg Businessweek Daily to discuss.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Gen-Z Traders Go for Broke In American Dream Pursuit
title_cn: Z世代交易者在追求美国梦的过程中陷入破碎
summary: Bloomberg's Justina Lee joins Lisa Mateo and Tom Keene on "Bloomberg Money." The share of stock volumes of retail investors has doubled over the past 15 years, Bloomberg Intelligence estimates. Social media and the gamification of trading have played a decisive role in the growth of investing in crypto, options, sports betting, and prediction markets. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AI Trade’s Bruising Week Forces Investors to Be More Selective
title_cn: AI Trade 的惨痛一周迫使投资者更加挑剔
summary: Adam Dell, founder and CEO at Domain Money joined Bloomberg Businessweek Daily to discuss the intersection of fintech, VC, and early stage startup mechanics and building a tech business.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: An Analyst’s Missed Remark Surfaced in Deadly Iran School Strike Probe
title_cn: 伊朗学校罢工事件调查中，一名分析师遗漏的言论浮出水面
summary: An intelligence analyst’s missed remarks are among the missteps surfaced in an investigation into a deadly strike against an elementary school in Iran.

title: Apple’s Vision Pro and Smart Glasses Chief to Join OpenAI
title_cn: 苹果 Vision Pro 和智能眼镜主管将加入 OpenAI
summary: Apple Inc.’s top executive in charge of the Vision Pro headset and the company’s smart glasses efforts is leaving for OpenAI, continuing a streak of high-profile defections to rivals in the artificial intelligence and hardware sectors.

title: Beyond Chips, IMF Sees AI Wealth Boom Adding to Inflation Risks
title_cn: 除了芯片之外，国际货币基金组织还认为人工智能财富繁荣会增加通胀风险
summary: Artificial intelligence may fuel inflation not just by driving up the cost of chips, but also by making consumers wealthier and more willing to spend, according to the International Monetary Fund’s chief economist.

title: Trump Vows 100% Tariff on Europe Over Digital Services Taxes
title_cn: 特朗普誓言对欧洲征收 100% 数字服务税
summary: President Donald Trump threatened to impose 100% tariffs on goods imported from countries that impose digital services taxes, escalating pressure on European nations that just ratified a trade pact with the US.

title: Consumer is Feeling 'A Lot of Pressure' But Bed Bath & Beyond Sees Upside
title_cn: 消费者感到“很大的压力”，但 Bed Bath & Beyond 看到了好处
summary: Amy Sullivan, CEO of Bed Bath & Beyond, said that consumers are feeling 'a lot of pressure' but that company's outlook is that if they can do business at a low point there is a high upside to come. Sullivan also talked about Bed Bath & Beyond's efforts to engage with consumers, including a new sweepstakes around the company's iconic coupons.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Uber Tightens US Driver Background Checks as Sexual Assault Cases Mount
title_cn: 随着性侵犯案件的增加，优步加强了美国司机的背景调查
summary: Uber Technologies Inc. is tightening driver background checks in the US and applying the new standards retroactively to existing workers, the company’s latest response to a wave of sexual-assault lawsuits brought by passengers.

title: iPhone Price Hikes Will Come, Says IDC
title_cn: IDC 表示 iPhone 价格将会上涨
summary: Apple announced price hikes across its hardware products, citing unprecedented price gains in memory chips. Missing from that price hike list, for now, is the iPhone. Nabila Popal, Senior Research Director at IDC, joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: What Is AI Distillation and Why Is It a Worry for the Industry?
title_cn: 什么是AI蒸馏？为什么它会引起业界的担忧？
summary: Artificial intelligence companies in the US have spent hundreds of billions of dollars to develop more advanced chatbots, betting they can earn enough from customers to justify the investment. That approach carries the risk of being undermined by rivals who build competing AI systems for far less.

title: OpenAI Weighs IPO in 2027 | Bloomberg Tech 6/26/2026
title_cn: OpenAI 考虑在 2027 年进行 IPO |彭博科技 2026 年 6 月 26 日
summary: Bloomberg’s Ed Ludlow breaks down OpenAI's decision to potentially hold off on an IPO until next year - sending shares of SoftBank falling. Plus, global tech stocks drop after Apple hikes hardware price due to a memory crunch, and SpaceX's $25 billion bond sale is off to a rocky start. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: BlackBerry CEO Says Safety Software Offers AI-Resistant Growth
title_cn: 黑莓首席执行官表示安全软件可实现抗人工智能增长
summary: BlackBerry Ltd. Chief Executive Officer John Giamatteo had a direct answer when asked about one of the biggest challenges to software providers: Artificial intelligence isn’t ready to displace his safety-certified products.

title: Cost of the AI Boom: Anxiety, Longer Hours
title_cn: 人工智能繁荣的成本：焦虑、更长的工作时间
summary: One of the promises of AI was alleviating the burdens of work, but the workaholic culture in Silicon Valley hasn't disappeared. Bloomberg's Natasha Mascarenhas explains why round-the-clock managing of AI agents and intense competition are driving longer hours and heightened anxiety for tech workers. She joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech" (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Launches Fresh Strikes on Iran Targets After Drone Hits
title_cn: 无人机袭击后美国对伊朗目标发动新一轮打击
summary: The US conducted a fresh round of strikes against multiple targets in Iran on Saturday, as a weekend of tit-for-tat attacks led both sides to claim violations of the ceasefire underpinning peace talks.

title: Trump Nominates Oklahoma Lawman as ICE Director
title_cn: 特朗普提名俄克拉荷马州执法人员为 ICE 局长
summary: President Donald Trump said he will nominate Lance Schroyer as director of US Immigration and Customs Enforcement, his first pick to hold the job permanently in his second term.

title: Milei’s Cabinet Chief Resigns Months After Private Jet Scandal
title_cn: 私人飞机丑闻数月后，米莱的内阁首长辞职
summary: Argentine President Javier Milei’s cabinet chief resigned Saturday after struggling for months to defuse corruption allegations, becoming the most high-profile departure since the libertarian leader took office.

title: US Conducts Fresh Round of Strikes in Iran After Second Ship Hit
title_cn: 第二艘船被击中后，美国对伊朗进行新一轮打击
summary: The US conducted a fresh round of strikes against multiple targets in Iran on Saturday, the military said.

title: UK Prioritizes High-Speed Boats, Drones in Defense Funding Shift
title_cn: 英国在国防资金转移中优先考虑高速船和无人机
summary: The UK government will commit more than £500 million ($660 million) to transform its elite Commando Force, as it shifts defense spending to focus more on the front line and NATO security.

title: Serbia’s Vucic Says He Will Resign Soon to Help Party in Vote
title_cn: 塞尔维亚总统武契奇表示他将很快辞职以帮助该党投票
summary: Serbia President Aleksandar Vucic says he’ll quit his post within weeks to help his political party win early elections expected later this year, a move that would enable him to stay in power as prime minister if the party prevails in the ballot.

title: Venezuela Quakes Push Fragile Health System to the Brink
title_cn: 委内瑞拉地震将脆弱的卫生系统推向崩溃的边缘
summary: Earthquake victims are overwhelming healthcare centers in Venezuela’s coastal state of La Guaira and beyond, pushing an already fragile health system past its limits.

title: AI Deepfake Political Ads Raise Concerns Ahead of Midterms
title_cn: 人工智能 Deepfake 政治广告在中期选举前引发担忧
summary: There is a growing prevalence of AI-generated deepfake political advertisements in the current midterm election cycle, including a deepfake resembling Billie Eilish, and a Texas Senate race ad showing a deepfake of Democrat James Talarico singing about transgender children. Bloomberg News corporate lobbying and influence reporter Emily Birnbaum discusses with hosts of Bloomberg This Weekend David Gura and Christina Ruffini the broader implications for election integrity, especially as the AI industry commits significant funding toward midterm elections. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Canada’s World Cup Dilemma: Visit LA to Cheer Team or Boycott US
title_cn: 加拿大的世界杯困境：前往洛杉矶为球队加油还是抵制美国
summary: Canadian soccer fans face a patriotic dilemma.

title: Ukraine Says It Targeted Russian Military Plant, Oil Station
title_cn: 乌克兰称其目标是俄罗斯军事工厂和油站
summary: Ukraine said it used Flamingo missiles to attack a military plant in Russia’s Volgograd and drones to strike an oil station in the Vladimir region close to Moscow, as Kyiv aims to bring Moscow to the negotiating table to end the war.

title: Tanker Struck in Hormuz as Navies Lift Threat Level to Ships
title_cn: 海军提升对船舶的威胁级别，油轮在霍尔木兹遇难
summary: A ship carrying Qatari oil was attacked in the Strait of Hormuz and naval authorities increased the threat level to shipping in the area, a fresh sign of rising tensions around the world’s most vital energy chokepoint.

title: Bolivia’s Paz Pushes Industry Reforms After 53 Days of Protests
title_cn: 玻利维亚总统帕兹在 53 天抗议后推动行业改革
summary: As Bolivians try to resume a sense of normalcy after 53 days of blockades that roiled the economy, President Rodrigo Paz is right back where he was just two months ago: attempting to reform the nationalistic laws that dictate the country’s key industries.

title: California Leaders Agree to $351 Billion Budget, Software Tax
title_cn: 加州领导人同意 3510 亿美元的软件税预算
summary: California Governor Gavin Newsom and top Democratic legislators have reached an agreement on a $351.7 billion state budget that will be bolstered in part by a newly proposed tax on digital software sales.

title: Trump Kicks Off Sales Pitch for Iran Deal Few Americans Like
title_cn: 特朗普开始推销伊朗协议，但很少有美国人喜欢
summary: As US officials hammered out an agreement weeks ago to end the war in Iran, President Donald Trump faced a dilemma: How to sell a provision that unlocked billions of dollars in frozen funds for Tehran to the American public.

title: Johannesburg Struggles to Keep Lights on But Redeems Bond
title_cn: 约翰内斯堡努力维持灯光但赎回债券
summary: The City of Johannesburg, which is on the verge of financial collapse, put investors at the front of its queue of creditors this week when it repaid a 1.44 billion rand ($88 million) bond.

title: China, Russia Conduct Joint Air Patrol Across Regional Seas
title_cn: 中俄在地区海域进行联合空中巡逻
summary: China and Russia conducted a joint strategic air patrol on June 27 over airspace spanning the Sea of Japan, the East China Sea and the western Pacific, according to China’s Ministry of National Defense.

title: US Signals It May Pull Bosnia Envoy Support as Talks Stall
title_cn: 由于谈判陷入僵局，美国表示可能取消波斯尼亚特使的支持
summary: The US has indicated it would withdraw its support for the office of High Representative in Bosnia and Herzegovina if the candidate it backs for the role isn’t appointed by month’s end, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Israel, Lebanon Reach Framework Deal Aiming to End Conflict
title_cn: 以色列和黎巴嫩达成旨在结束冲突的框架协议
summary: Israel, Lebanon and the US reached an initial trilateral framework agreement aimed at paving the way for ending the conflict between the two countries and ultimately reaching a peace settlement, a senior Israeli official said Friday.

title: Trump Visit to India in 2027 in the Works, Rubio Tells IANS
title_cn: 卢比奥告诉 IANS，特朗普将于 2027 年访问印度
summary: The US is working toward a visit by President Donald Trump to India early next year while aiming to finalize a bilateral trade deal in the coming weeks or months, Secretary of State Marco Rubio told IANS.

title: Burnham to Reveal Devolution Push in First Speech, Times Reports
title_cn: 据《泰晤士报》报道，伯纳姆将在第一次演讲中透露权力下放的推动力
summary: Andy Burnham is expected to unveil a raft of plans focusing on devolving powers and money from central government to England’s regions in his first major policy speech since announcing he would stand for leadership of the Labour party.

title: Putin’s Glide Bombs Are Turning Ukraine’s Fortress City Into Rubble
title_cn: 普京的滑翔炸弹正在将乌克兰的要塞城市变成废墟
summary: The off-duty soldiers were in a coffee shop near to Peace Square in Kramatorsk when a Russian glide bomb struck nearby.

title: South African Freight Firms Brace for Mass Anti-Migrant Protests
title_cn: 南非货运公司准备迎接大规模反移民抗议
summary: South African freight operators are delaying deliveries, mapping alternative routes and weighing additional security before anti-migrant demonstrations scheduled for June 30, as they seek to shield workers and cargo from possible disruptions along some of the busiest transport corridors.

title: Days Ahead to Show If Burnham Plays Politics Better Than Starmer
title_cn: 未来几天将显示伯纳姆是否比斯塔默更好地玩政治
summary: Standing across from Keir Starmer in the Commons chamber this week, opposition leader Kemi Badenoch drew on a particularly violent metaphor for how the Labour Party had ditched him when she conjured up an image of “400 knives stuck in the prime minister’s back.”

title: Trump’s Troop Withdrawal Leaves Germany’s Base Towns in Limbo
title_cn: 特朗普的撤军让德国的基地城镇陷入困境
summary: Threatened shifts in US defense spending in Europe mean risk and opportunity for affected communities.

title: US Strikes Iran in Response to Drone Attack in Strait of Hormuz
title_cn: 美国打击伊朗以回应霍尔木兹海峡的无人机袭击
summary: The US attacked Iran one day after Tehran struck a commercial ship in the Strait of Hormuz, an exchange that threatened to break the fragile ceasefire between the two countries.
